subject: ap-chemistry
title: Intermolecular Forces & Properties
stimulus: Aluminum metal can be recycled from scrap metal by melting the metal to evaporate impurities.

parts.prompt:
Calculate the amount of heat needed to purify 1.00 mole of Al originally at 298 K by melting it. The
melting point of Al is 933 K. The molar heat capacity of Al is 24 J/(mol⋅K), and the heat of fusion
of Al is 10.7 kJ/mol.

The equation for the overall process of extracting Al from $Al_2O_3$
is shown below. Which requires less
energy, recycling existing Al or extracting Al from $Al_2O_3$
? Justify your answer with a calculation.
$Al_2O_3$ (s) 2Al(s) $O_2$(g) DH =1675kJ/mol
2 3 2 2 rxn
